title: War against Iran expands into Lebanon as Israel battles Hezbollah
summary_full: Fighting near Beirut and in southern Lebanon has killed more than 630 people and forced at least 800,000 from their homes.
summary_public: Fighting near Beirut and in southern Lebanon has killed more than 630 people and forced at least 800,000 from their homes.
